Description (CN): 秦国近战基础单位，战力稳定可靠。
Description (EN): A dependable Qin melee unit with straightforward power.

Description (CN): 久经沙场的秦军前线老兵，持续施压，坚不可摧。
Description (EN): A hardened Qin front-line unit built for steady pressure.

Description (CN): 秦国精锐攻击单位，独立战力极高。
Description (EN): An elite Qin attacker with high standalone strength.

Description (CN): 出牌：使己方战力最低的单位增加 3 点战力。
Description (EN): On play: boost the allied unit with the lowest power by 3.

Description (CN): 出牌：对随机敌方单位造成 2 点伤害，共两次。
Description (EN): On play: deal 2 damage to a random enemy unit twice.

Description (CN): 可靠的秦军长枪兵，坚守阵线。
Description (EN): A reliable Qin spearman holding the front line.

Description (CN): 操纵大型攻城器械的秦军技术专家。
Description (EN): A Qin engineering specialist operating heavy siege weapons.

Description (CN): 出牌：对战力最低的敌方单位造成 2 点伤害。
Description (EN): On play: deal 2 damage to the enemy unit with the lowest power.

Description (CN): 出牌：对战力最高的敌方单位造成 3 点伤害。
Description (EN): On play: deal 3 damage to the enemy unit with the highest power.

Description (CN): 出牌：使己方所有近战单位各增加 2 点战力。秦国强盛之本，变法奠基者。
Description (EN): On play: boost all allied melee units by 2. The architect of Qin's power.

Description (CN): 出牌：消灭战力最低的敌方单位。人屠，杀神之名震天下。
Description (EN): On play: destroy the enemy unit with the lowest power. The God of Slaughter.

Description (CN): 出牌：若己方积分领先，自身增加 3 点战力。以强者之姿主动出击的名将。
Description (EN): On play: if you are ahead on points, gain 3 power. A general who fights from strength.

Description (CN): 对随机敌方单位造成 2 点伤害，共两次。
Description (EN): Deal 2 damage to a random enemy unit twice.

Description (CN): 在近战区召唤两名秦国征召兵。
Description (EN): Summon two Qin Conscripts to the melee row.

Description (CN): 被召唤的征召兵。独自孱弱，成群可畏。
Description (EN): A summoned Qin conscript. Weak alone, dangerous in numbers.

Description (CN): 楚国基础近战单位，是群攻战术的骨干力量。
Description (EN): A modest Chu melee unit that supports swarm strategies.

Description (CN): 基础楚国远程单位，用于建立场面优势。
Description (EN): A basic Chu ranged unit for building board presence.

Description (CN): 出牌：在近战区召唤一名楚国武士。
Description (EN): On play: summon one Chu Warrior to the melee row.

Description (CN): 出牌：随机增强 2 名己方单位各 1 点战力。
Description (EN): On play: boost 2 random allied units by 1.

Description (CN): 出牌：若己方场上有 4 个或更多单位，自身增加 3 点战力。人多则强。
Description (EN): On play: if you control 4 or more units, gain 3 power. Strength in numbers.

Description (CN): 楚国基础前线兵卒，人多势众。
Description (EN): A basic Chu frontline soldier, one of many.

Description (CN): 持重盾的楚国士卒，坚守近战阵线。
Description (EN): A Chu soldier with a heavy shield, holding the melee line.

Description (CN): 驻守险要渡口的楚国防御单位。
Description (EN): A Chu defender positioned at river crossings.

Description (CN): 出牌：使己方战力最低的单位增加 3 点战力。
Description (EN): On play: boost the allied unit with the lowest power by 3.

Description (CN): 出牌：召唤一名楚国武士，再使最弱的己方单位增加 1 点战力。
Description (EN): On play: summon one Chu Warrior, then boost the weakest ally by 1.

Description (CN): 出牌：使己方所有近战单位各增加 1 点战力。战国四公子之一。
Description (EN): On play: boost all allied melee units by 1. One of the Four Lords of the Warring States.

Description (CN): 出牌：若己方有 6 个或更多单位，自身增加 4 点战力。楚国全力爆发的象征。
Description (EN): On play: if you control 6 or more units, gain 4 power. The might of Chu unleashed.

Description (CN): 召唤两名楚国武士，再使最弱的己方单位增加 1 点战力。
Description (EN): Summon two Chu Warriors, then boost the weakest ally by 1.

Description (CN): 使己方所有远程单位各增加 2 点战力。

Description (CN): 被召唤的楚国武士。单个微弱，成群则铺天盖地。

Description (CN): 坚实的齐国近战单位，基础战力稳健。
Description (EN): A sturdy Qi melee unit with solid baseline power.

Description (CN): 出牌：摸 1 张牌，再弃 1 张牌。优化手牌，寻找最佳选择。

Description (CN): 摸 2 张牌，再弃 1 张牌。齐国最伟大政治家的智慧传承。
Description (EN): Draw 2 cards, then discard 1. The wisdom of Qi's greatest statesman.

Description (CN): 出牌：对战力最高的敌方单位造成 3 点伤害。扰乱之术的宗师。
Description (EN): On play: deal 3 damage to the enemy unit with the highest power. A master of disruption.

Description (CN): 出牌：摸 1 张牌，再弃 1 张牌。以随机应变著称的战略大家。
Description (EN): On play: draw 1 card, then discard 1. Renowned for strategic flexibility.

Description (CN): 可靠的齐国前线枪兵。
Description (EN): A dependable Qi front-line spearman.

Description (CN): 操持强弩的精锐齐国远程单位。
Description (EN): A skilled Qi ranged unit with a powerful crossbow.

Description (CN): 在后方操作攻城器械的齐国工兵。
Description (EN): A Qi crew operating siege equipment at a distance.

Description (CN): 出牌：摸 2 张牌，再弃 1 张牌。稷下学宫的资深智谋之士。
Description (EN): On play: draw 2 cards, then discard 1. A senior Jixia Academy thinker.

Description (CN): 出牌：摸 1 张牌，弃 1 张牌，并对随机敌方单位造成 1 点伤害。
Description (EN): On play: draw 1, discard 1, and deal 1 damage to a random enemy.

Description (CN): 出牌：对敌方最强单位造成 3 点伤害，自身再增加 1 点战力。齐国的守护者。
Description (EN): On play: deal 3 damage to the enemy's strongest unit, then gain 1 power. Defender of Qi.

Description (CN): 出牌：摸 2 张牌弃 1 张，再对最强敌方单位造成 3 点伤害。《孙子兵法》的化身。
Description (EN): On play: draw 2 cards discard 1, then deal 3 damage to the strongest enemy. The Art of War personified.

Description (CN): 出牌：使最弱的己方单位增加 2 点战力，再摸 1 张牌弃 1 张。齐国最伟大的宰相。
Description (EN): On play: boost the weakest ally by 2, then draw 1 and discard 1. Qi's greatest prime minister.

Description (CN): 出牌：对战力最低的敌方单位造成 2 点伤害。
Description (EN): On play: deal 2 damage to the enemy unit with the lowest power.

Description (CN): 摸 3 张牌，再弃 2 张牌。以稷下之精准刷新手牌。
Description (EN): Draw 3 cards, then discard 2. Refresh your hand with Jixia precision.

Description (CN): 机动性强的赵国骑兵，近战战力可靠。
Description (EN): A mobile Zhao cavalry unit with reliable melee strength.

Description (CN): 使己方所有近战单位各增加 1 点战力。令赵国令诸侯忌惮的骑兵改革。
Description (EN): Boost all allied melee units by 1. The cavalry reform that made Zhao feared.

Description (CN): 出牌：若己方积分落后，自身增加 3 点战力。赵国最伟大的守将。
Description (EN): On play: if you are losing on points, gain 3 power. Zhao's greatest defender.

Description (CN): 出牌：若对手本轮已弃权，自身增加 2 点战力。惩处犹豫之敌的铁血名将。
Description (EN): On play: if your opponent has passed this round, gain 2 power. A general who punishes hesitation.

Description (CN): 对随机敌方单位造成 2 点伤害，共两次。迅猛而凌厉。
Description (EN): Deal 2 damage to a random enemy unit twice. Swift and brutal.

Description (CN): 在北方边境历练的坚韧赵国步兵。
Description (EN): A sturdy Zhao foot soldier trained for the northern frontier.

Description (CN): 擅用复合弓的赵国远程射手。
Description (EN): A Zhao ranged unit skilled with the composite bow.

Description (CN): 在后阵操控投石车的赵国工兵。
Description (EN): A Zhao crew managing catapults at the rear.

Description (CN): 出牌：若己方积分落后，自身增加 2 点战力。困境中愈发凶猛的赵国铁骑。
Description (EN): On play: if you are losing on points, gain 2 power. Zhao cavalry at its fiercest when cornered.

Description (CN): 出牌：使己方战力最低的单位增加 3 点战力。
Description (EN): On play: boost the allied unit with the lowest power by 3.

Description (CN): 出牌：封锁敌方战力最高的单位，使其技能失效。
Description (EN): On play: lock the enemy unit with the highest power, disabling its skill.

Description (CN): 出牌：若己方积分落后，自身增加 4 点战力。在秦廷之上捍卫赵国尊严的外交家。
Description (EN): On play: if you are losing on points, gain 4 power. Zhao's defiant voice at the court of Qin.

Description (CN): 出牌：对战力最低的敌方单位造成 3 点伤害。那位诗人武将之父。
Description (EN): On play: deal 3 damage to the enemy unit with the lowest power. Father of the warrior poet.

Description (CN): 出牌：若落后则增加 3 点战力；再使最弱的己方单位增加 2 点战力。赵国最后的希望。
Description (EN): On play: if losing, gain 3 power; then boost the weakest ally by 2. Zhao's last hope.

Description (CN): 对随机敌方单位造成 2 点伤害，再封锁敌方最强单位。
Description (EN): Deal 2 damage to a random enemy, then lock the enemy's strongest unit.

Description (CN): 从你的牌组中摸 1 张牌。
Description (EN): Draw 1 card from your deck.

Description (CN): 4战力的攻城单位，使所有己方攻城单位增加 1 点战力。
Description (EN): A 4-power siege unit that buffs all allied siege units by 1.

Description (CN): 使最弱的己方单位增加 3 点战力。
Description (EN): Buff your weakest unit by 3.

Description (CN): 对最强的敌方单位造成 3 点伤害。
Description (EN): Deal 3 damage to the strongest enemy unit.

Description (CN): 7战力的近战英雄，出牌时自身增加 2 点战力——实际战力为 9。
Description (EN): A 7-power melee hero who buffs himself by 2 when played — effectively 9 power.

Description (CN): 摸 1 张牌，再使最强的己方单位增加 4 点战力。终极战术秘籍。
Description (EN): Draw 1 card, then buff your strongest unit by 4. The ultimate tactical tome.
